Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Loyalties are tested when Hunter jeopardizes a case prosecuted by the Assistant DA, whom McCall loves.
Video.title: Presumed Guilty

Video.summary: When the husband of a policewoman is murdered, Hunter and McCall suspect the woman's patrol partner.
Video.title: Partners

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Hunter confronts the entire police department to defend the actions of a Chinese-American policewoman.
Video.title: Honorable Profession

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall cope with the double and triple-crossing of a criminal who once saved Hunter's life.
Video.title: Payback

Video.summary: Mysterious recordings accusing a powerful company of dumping toxic waste seem like a prank, until the killings
Video.title: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Image.alt: No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished
No Good Deed Ever Goes Unpunished

Video.summary: Although Rita objects, a gigolo/killer-turned-writer is released on parole into the custody of his publisher. When the publisher's oversexed wife is found murdered, Rita immediately suspects the parolee but later learns that he's innocent of this crime.
Video.title: Crime Of Love

Video.summary: Rita Infiltrates a phone sex operation to find a murderer.
Video.title: Voices

Video.summary: Three fhends are stalked by a serial killer; Chris worries after turning to Cotton for help with a tax audit.
Video.title: Team Spirit

Video.summary: Chris falls for a suspected mob assassin.
Video.title: The Perfect Alibi

Video.summary: Rita and Chris must protect Donnie 'Dogs' Dibarto from a notorious mobster named Tony 'Toe Tag' Torino, when he attempts to muscle in on a piece of Dibarto's action and Dibarto decides to turn state's evidence. The situation gets further complicated when a Miami cop named Dexter, who's running the investigation on Torino and is suppose to be providing protection for Dibarto may or may not be on the up and up. When the hitters start getting too close, Rita and Chris must try and determine if Dexter is a 'dirty cop' or not.
Video.title: To Serve And Protect

Video.summary: Rita and Chris pursue a call girl killer.
Video.title: Tough Love

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy disagree over a psychic who claims to have knowledge of a murder.
Video.title: A Question of Faith

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate the murder of a popular Cuban businessman.
Video.title: Fevers

Video.summary: As he and Cassy investigate the mysterious death of a newlywed couple, Tom seeks advice on gening back into the dating game.
Video.title: Guilt By Association

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy are called in to investigate the mysterious deaths of a wealthy woman's pets.
Video.title: Night Of The Parrot

Video.summary: A murder investigation uncovers evidence of a political assassination about to take place in Palm Beach. Cassy investigate a murder.
Video.title: Air-Tight Alibi

Video.summary: The investigation of an apparent car accident uncovers a murder scheme.
Video.title: Family Affair

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy set out to acquit a close friend who's been accused of murder.
Video.title: Child's Play
